About the Therapist

Meet Waqas Chaudhary

With years of dedicated practice in Hijama Cupping Therapy, Waqas Chaudhary brings you an authentic, safe, and deeply healing experience rooted in Islamic tradition and modern understanding of the body.

Trained and certified, Waqas combines the Sunnah method with hygienic protocols to deliver results that patients across Mumbai trust and recommend.

What We Offer

Our Healing Services

🫙

Dry Cupping

Traditional suction cupping applied to key pressure points to improve blood flow, ease muscle tension, and stimulate the lymphatic system.

🩸

Wet Cupping (Hijama)

The authentic Sunnah method — gentle skin incisions followed by cupping to draw out toxins and stagnant blood for deep purification.

🌀

Massage Cupping

Gliding cups over oiled skin to provide a deep-tissue massage effect, releasing fascia and improving circulation throughout the body.

🎯

Pain Relief Sessions

Targeted cupping for back pain, neck stiffness, headaches, and joint discomfort — tailored to your specific area of concern.

🧘

Sunnah Hijama Days

Special sessions on the 17th, 19th, and 21st of the Islamic month — the optimal Sunnah dates for maximum therapeutic benefit.

🏠

Home Visit Service

Can't make it to the clinic? We offer professional home-visit sessions for your comfort and convenience (subject to availability).

How It Works

Your Healing Journey

1

Book Your Session

Contact Waqas via WhatsApp or call to schedule your appointment on a convenient date. Sunnah days are highly recommended.

2

Consultation & Assessment

A brief health assessment helps identify your specific needs — pain points, chronic conditions, and therapeutic goals.

3

The Healing Session

Cupping is applied with full hygiene protocols in a calm, comfortable environment. Sessions typically last 30–60 minutes.

4

Post-Session Guidance

Receive personalized aftercare advice including dietary tips, rest recommendations, and the best time for your next session.
